title: Air China Cargo Expands Daily Flights from Glasgow Prestwick to Chengdu

sections.heading: What happened
sections.content: Glasgow Prestwick Airport has revealed that Air China Cargo is increasing its service to Chengdu, moving to a daily flight schedule. This change is set to enhance the volume of cargo transported between the two locations, improving logistics and supply chain operations.

sections.heading: Why it matters
sections.content: The expansion of Air China Cargo's services is expected to significantly bolster trade opportunities between the United Kingdom and China. Daily flights provide an increased capacity for cargo, potentially benefiting local businesses by improving access to international markets.

sourceReferences.citationText: serper-scottish-aviation – Air China Cargo increases Chengdu service to daily flights from Glasgow Prestwick Airport
